title: RTL default view
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there a way to set the default view to RTL? so when I write anything in Hebrew and English it won’t be messed up? 
Thanks, 
Yaniv

posts.author: YanivG (Yaniv Goldberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to set the default view to RTL? so when I write anything in Hebrew and English it won’t be messed up?

Thanks,
Yaniv

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @YanivG

We do not support RTL capabilities at the moment, so this will not be possible.

While it will not translate the names of items, boards, columns, etc, you CAN change the language of the system controls, icons, etc. from within your profile! Check out this article for more details: Is monday.com available in other languages?

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
